title: Jagamerigina Satyam
overview: In 1994, in the picturesque village of Dimda on the Telangana border, this is the gripping story of Satyam-a kind-hearted farmer's son. His love for Saritha, the village sarpanch's niece, sparks jealousy and rage, leading to betrayal.
